name: Sicilian Meat Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, bread crumbs (about 1/4 cup per slice), tomato juice, parsley, oregano, salt, pepper, and garlic in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Add ground beef to the mixture and stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. On waxed paper or foil, pat the meat into a rectangle measuring approximately 12 inches by 10 inches.
4. Arrange ham slices atop the meat, leaving a small margin around the edges.
5. Sprinkle shredded Mozeralla cheese over the ham.
6. Starting from the narrow end of the rectangle, roll up the meat using the waxed paper or foil to help lift it. Make sure to seal the edges and ends securely.
7. Place the rolled meat seam-side down on a baking pan measuring 13 inches by 9 inches by 2 inches.
8. Bake at 350°F for one hour and fifteen minutes, or until cooked through. Note that the center of the roll may remain pink due to the color from the ham slices.
9. Cut three slices of Mozeralla cheese diagonally and place them on top of the roll.
10. Return the roll to the oven until the cheese has melted, approximately 5 minutes.
11. This dish is also delicious served cold or in sandwich breads.
